author: fatrubbitrunner
title: Great
content: Its relly great. The music is high qualty, and its easy to navigate the app. 5/5.

author: Roped2
title: The best
content: I have been using it for at least a year now and i had 0 ZERO issues. It does what it does flawlessly. And i use the free version

title: The BEST
content: Hands down this is the best offline music player app on iOS
